title: Atelier Steel
summary: An architect's night studio: three tones of charcoal, one bone-warm foil, one typeface (Geist). The chrome carries no chromatic information — the iframe is the only colour on screen.
darkAccent: bone-warm #D7CDB6 — active dock left bar + saving pill only
typeface: Geist (500 headline, 400 body) — one face does everything
railTreatment: five Geist monograms with italic/roman alternation for silhouette distinctness — Si roman · SM italic · Bp roman · Db italic · Lg roman

title: Charcoal Foundry
summary: A heavy iron foundry at dusk: matte black metal lit by a single dim amber bulb. Mona Sans Wide carries the voice; the amber filament lives only on the saving pill and the active dock bar.
darkAccent: amber #E08A2C — saving pill + active dock left bar (nowhere else)
typeface: Mona Sans (Wide cut 115–125% for headings, Regular for body)
railTreatment: five stamped roundels with one dominant first-letter (S · M · B · D · L) and a subscript partner — silhouette-distinct in peripheral vision

title: Observatory Readout
summary: An astronomical control desk at 2 a.m. Five rail buttons are five distinct celestial marks; Fraunces + Public Sans carry the antique-instrument voice; one warm amber star is the only chromatic event.
darkAccent: warm amber #E5A24A — active dock left bar + saving pill + toggle on-state
typeface: Fraunces (display / pane titles) + Public Sans (body and forms)
railTreatment: five distinct inline-SVG celestial marks: ringed dot · italic SM ligature · transit-line dash · three horizon bars · vertical log-stack (lines of unequal length + trailing dot)

title: Onyx Museum
summary: Museum after-hours: black walls, a single warm picture light. Each tool is a room. Iframe is the only object the gallery lamp is pointed at.
darkAccent: bone-cream #D9CFAA — active wall-label numeral, picture light on the iframe, saving pill text only
typeface: Spectral 500 (display, rail numerals, pane titles) + Plus Jakarta Sans 400/500 (body, forms, log lines)
railTreatment: wall-label Roman numerals I, II, III, IV, V in Spectral 22px ink-secondary; active goes bone-cream and the 2px bone bar appears at the left edge

title: Brutalist Editorial
summary: Le Monde Diplomatique after dark. One ruled column, italic Spectral words for the rail, no icons. Red-ochre lives only on the saving pill text.
darkAccent: red-ochre #B14A39 — saving pill text ONLY; active rail dock is plain ink-primary (no chromatic accent on the rail)
typeface: Spectral 500/600 (display, pane titles, rail words) + Public Sans 400/500 (body, agate, forms)
railTreatment: vertical typeset column of italic Spectral 12px words — Sites · Manager · Blueprint · Database · Logs. Active bolds to ink-primary with a 2px ink-primary left bar. No icons at all.

title: Inked Schema
summary: An 1890s engineering journal printed in dark mode. Five rail docks are 'Fig. N' captions over unique hand-drawn schema marks. Single muted ink-blue accent.
darkAccent: ink-blue #5C8AA6 — saving pill + a thin underline beneath the active dock's schema mark
typeface: Crimson Pro 500 italic (display, journal mast, Fig. captions, pane titles) + Public Sans 400/500 (body, schedules, forms, log lines)
railTreatment: each dock is a 'Fig. N' italic caption + a unique hand-drawn SVG schema mark beneath — triangle (Fig.1 Sites), gear-tooth notch (Fig.2 Manager), cross-section ladder (Fig.3 Blueprint), cylinder stack (Fig.4 Database), scribble line (Fig.5 Logs)

title: Tokaido Lacquer
summary: Lacquered black with one rusted vermilion seal — hand-cut woodblock glyphs on the rail; the seal appears only beside the active dock and on the Saved pill.
darkAccent: vermilion #C24A2C — only on the 4 px seal-square beside the active dock and on the Saved-state pill background
typeface: Newsreader italic (display, pane titles, identity) + Plus Jakarta Sans (body, forms, labels)
railTreatment: five hand-built woodblock SVG glyphs — Sites = horizon over water, Site Manager = a key, Blueprint = a folded paper crease, Database = a stacked-stone cairn, Logs = a single brush stroke; active glyph keeps its silhouette and gains the vermilion 4 px square at its left edge

title: Monastery Scriptorium
summary: A hand-illuminated manuscript at candlelight — five illuminated capitals on the rail; gilt fills the active letter and a sparse quill flourish curls around it.
darkAccent: gilt #B3893D — only on the active-dock initial fill and the Saved-state pill background
typeface: Cormorant Garamond (rail capitals and pane titles only) + Atkinson Hyperlegible (body, forms, log lines, labels — engineered for legibility on dark backgrounds)
railTreatment: five illuminated capitals S, M, B, D, L set in Cormorant Garamond 28 px ink-secondary; active capital fills gilt #B3893D and a sparse hand-drawn quill flourish curls around it in inline SVG at ink-secondary tone

title: Graphite Engineer
summary: An engineering report binder — graphite, one drafting-red rule, five stamped numerals replace the rail icons. Pure focus on the iframe.
darkAccent: drafting red #B84A39 — active dock 2 px left bar + saving/stale pill + primary CTA
typeface: Space Grotesk (500/600 headline + tabular numerals) + Public Sans (400/500 body)
railTreatment: five stamped numerals 01 02 03 04 05 in Space Grotesk tabular medium, ink-secondary inactive; active turns ink-primary with a 2 px drafting-red left bar

title: Subterranean Telecom
summary: A Cold-War switching room — graphite, one muted teal rule, five engraved patch labels (SI/01 … LG/05) instead of icons. Quiet infrastructure.
darkAccent: muted signal teal #3E8A78 — active dock 2 px left bar + saving/stale pill + primary CTA
typeface: Recursive Sans (Linear, proportional) — single variable face, weight axis carries display and body; MONO axis only inside the editor blocks
railTreatment: five hand-cut patch labels — uppercase pair SI / SM / BP / DB / LG with a half-size serial code /01 /02 /03 /04 /05 typeset to the right; all proportional Recursive medium; active brightens to ink and adds a 2 px teal left rule
